backend.changelog: ADR-019 source-cache freshness fix complete (Stages A + B + C). Generate now detects when a BOM item or drawing has been updated on 3DEXPERIENCE within the same revision letter (new geometry iteration, attribute change, lifecycle promotion) by tracking the platform cestamp / modified per item. Stale items get their SW source closed and reopened so SOLIDWORKS Connector pulls the latest rep before SaveAs3 writes the derivative. First Generate per BOM populates the per-tenant stamp cache; subsequent runs do nothing for unchanged items (zero cost) and just-the-changed-items for the rest. Force Regenerate semantic widened: ON now also force-refreshes every BOM source from the platform (not just regenerate cached outputs). Workstation must be on CadBridge 1.8.45+ for the agent close-pass to actually run; older agents see the new fields absent and behave as before.

cadBridge.changelog: ADR-019 Stage B -- agent honors StaleItems[] (EngItem PLMIDs) and StaleDrawingPids[] sent by frontend (1.1.13+). At Generate start, before the BOM-driven OpenDoc7-per-item loop, the agent enumerates open SW docs and closes any whose GetPLMID() matches the stale set. The subsequent EngItem-OpenDoc7 path (1.8.43+) then pulls the latest rep from the platform instead of returning the stale in-memory handle. New Stale bool on PreCacheDrawingItem skips the cached-.SLDDRW SwDm short-circuit and forces OpenDoc7. Backward compatible: older frontends sending empty / null lists trigger no close-pass.
